title: CT5 static tactic graph — Local-to-global bookkeeping
description: Concrete static-graph schema for CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping). It requires the complete 18-node array in fixed source order from CT5.N01 through CT5.N18, with exact node IDs, ordinals, and roles; all remaining graph data must satisfy the generic tactic specification.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping) tactic specification; must equal "CT5".

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N01, "Input — P_1→5: linear local-site family S", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N01".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N01, "Input — P_1→5: linear local-site family S"; must equal the integer 1.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N01, "Input — P_1→5: linear local-site family S"; must equal "input", meaning this node records branch-state input that must already be available.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N02, "Lemma — site dichotomy: active or inactive in the branch state", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N02".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N02, "Lemma — site dichotomy: active or inactive in the branch state"; must equal the integer 2.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N02, "Lemma — site dichotomy: active or inactive in the branch state"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N03, "Lemma — inactive sites create bounded local witnesses", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N03".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N03, "Lemma — inactive sites create bounded local witnesses"; must equal the integer 3.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N03, "Lemma — inactive sites create bounded local witnesses"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N04, "Lemma — each global estimate is backed by local witnesses?", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N04".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N04, "Lemma — each global estimate is backed by local witnesses?"; must equal the integer 4.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N04, "Lemma — each global estimate is backed by local witnesses?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N05, "Routing theorem — what failed in the locality lemma?", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N05".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N05, "Routing theorem — what failed in the locality lemma?"; must equal the integer 5.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N05, "Routing theorem — what failed in the locality lemma?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N06, "Scope candidate — no bounded witnesses — scope audit", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N06".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N06, "Scope candidate — no bounded witnesses — scope audit"; must equal the integer 6.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N06, "Scope candidate — no bounded witnesses — scope audit"; must equal "scope_audit", meaning this node records a candidate scope obstruction for audit, not as a proved fact.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N07, "Lemma — canonical charging of witnesses to scarce payers", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N07".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N07, "Lemma — canonical charging of witnesses to scarce payers"; must equal the integer 7.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N07, "Lemma — canonical charging of witnesses to scarce payers"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N08, "Payload record — P_5→11: additive global deficit", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N08".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N08, "Payload record — P_5→11: additive global deficit"; must equal the integer 8.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N08, "Payload record — P_5→11: additive global deficit"; must equal "residual_record", meaning this node records typed data that survives the branch.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N09, "Lemma — local-to-global summation", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N09".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N09, "Lemma — local-to-global summation"; must equal the integer 9.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N09, "Lemma — local-to-global summation"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N10, "Lemma — P_5→11 satisfies CT11 trigger", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N10".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N10, "Lemma — P_5→11 satisfies CT11 trigger"; must equal the integer 10.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N10, "Lemma — P_5→11 satisfies CT11 trigger"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N11, "Comparison theorem — does forced local mass exceed capacity?", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N11".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N11, "Comparison theorem — does forced local mass exceed capacity?"; must equal the integer 11.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N11, "Comparison theorem — does forced local mass exceed capacity?"; must equal "comparison", meaning this node compares certified quantities and routes every outcome.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N12, "Payload lemma — build P_5→4 — _S,P_S,pi_S,C_S,ell_S", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N12".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N12, "Payload lemma — build P_5→4 — _S,P_S,pi_S,C_S,ell_S"; must equal the integer 12.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N12, "Payload lemma — build P_5→4 — _S,P_S,pi_S,C_S,ell_S"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N13, "CT 4 — charging", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N13".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N13, "CT 4 — charging"; must equal the integer 13.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N13, "CT 4 — charging"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N14, "CT 11 — localization", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N14".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N14, "CT 11 — localization"; must equal the integer 14.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N14, "CT 11 — localization"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N15, "C4 — P_5→ C4 — global contradiction", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N15".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N15, "C4 — P_5→ C4 — global contradiction"; must equal the integer 15.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N15, "C4 — P_5→ C4 — global contradiction"; must equal "certificate", meaning this node is a terminal closure or contradiction certificate.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N16, "Payload record — P_5→14: local mass not yet decisive", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N16".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N16, "Payload record — P_5→14: local mass not yet decisive"; must equal the integer 16.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N16, "Payload record — P_5→14: local mass not yet decisive"; must equal "residual_record", meaning this node records typed data that survives the branch.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N17, "Lemma — P_5→14 satisfies CT14 trigger", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N17".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N17, "Lemma — P_5→14 satisfies CT14 trigger"; must equal the integer 17.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N17, "Lemma — P_5→14 satisfies CT14 trigger"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT5.N18, "CT 14 — aggregate closure", in CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5.N18".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT5.N18, "CT 14 — aggregate closure"; must equal the integer 18.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT5.N18, "CT 14 — aggregate closure"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodes.description: Required complete node specification for CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must contain exactly 18 generic node objects in source order from CT5.N01 through CT5.N18, with the fixed identity, ordinal, and role declared at each position.
